---
title: "Club Membership Management"
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Feature
Add the ability for club leaders and teachers to manage club membership lists. This includes:
- Assigning/removing club leaders and teachers
- Viewing and updating member lists
- Approving or removing members

## Why
Currently, only basic activity sign-up is supported. This will enable more realistic club operations and oversight.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Club leaders/teachers can add/remove members
- Only authorized users can manage their club
- UI for managing club membership
